role_title: Associate Manager, Commerce Platform Logistics - Strategy and Operations

level_signals: Title is Associate Manager (not Manager or Senior Manager)
Base range $105,400–$155,000 consistent with mid-level IC / early manager at DoorDash

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Have 3-5 years of relevant experience in high-growth environments required
Bachelor's degree required; Masters Degree preferred but not required.
You have strong analytical skills and can use data to identify trends, uncover root causes, and drive informed decision-making.
You are a strong problem solver and can break down complex problems into actionable steps.
You thrive in a cross-functional environment and are comfortable working with Product, Engineering, Analytics, and Operations teams.
You are highly detail-oriented and have a strong ability to organize, track, and analyze performance data.
You have a bias for action and can operate effectively in fast-paced, ambiguous environments.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You are comfortable working with data—SQL experience is a plus but not required.
Bachelor's degree required; Masters Degree preferred but not required.

scope.surface: Commerce Platform Logistics — Drive On-Demand white-label fulfillment; Restaurant (Rx) business; Catering and Health business lines
scope.business_model: B2B2C — white-label logistics fulfillment platform for merchants (restaurants, grocers, retailers)
core_responsibilities: Track and analyze cost and quality metrics across strategic merchants, conducting deep-dives to identify key drivers of quality defects and savings opportunities.
Own logistics for high-growth business lines in Catering and Health
Assist in structuring and executing operational tests to identify solutions for reducing defects like lateness or in-store wait times.
Partner with Logistics, Analytics, and Product teams to scope and assess initiatives that can improve the efficiency and quality of the logistics system
Engage with cross-functional teams to support initiatives that enhance merchant and customer experience.
Analyze key quality metrics and contribute to defining north star metrics that track performance improvements.
Partner with GMs to identify and execute growth strategy through data-driven insights to drive business top line.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams (Product, Analytics, Engineering, and Operations) to influence product roadmap on quality-focused features.
Run structured experiments and operational tests to uncover the best ways to improve fulfillment quality.

green_flags: Role has clear ownership areas (Catering and Health business lines)
High visibility: 'high growth/high visible opportunity' stated explicitly
Posting has a stated fill-by date (7/5/26), suggesting active search
SQL noted as a plus but not required — lower barrier to entry on technical side
red_flags: Work location type not stated anywhere in the JD — remote eligibility and office requirements are entirely unclear
Role is titled 'Associate Manager' but may not involve people management — career trajectory could be ambiguous
Compensation range is wide ($49K spread) suggesting significant location-based variation without clear guidance

seniority.manages_people (inferred as false from role description; no direct management language)

location.type (JD does not specify remote, hybrid, or onsite — marked 'unclear')
location.visa_sponsorship (marked 'unclear' as not addressed in JD)
ambiguities: Location type is entirely absent from the JD body — cannot determine if role is remote, hybrid, or onsite.

The national pay range is stated as applying 'within the United States, including Illinois and Colorado' but the JD also notes 'Base salary is localized according to an employee's work location' — implies pay could vary further by city/region.
The 3-5 years experience clause uses 'required' but the phrasing 'relevant experience in high-growth environments' is broad — exact domain requirements are ambiguous.
